subcodes.first_line: O My Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of them that have turned unto God and hearkened unto His call, have attained unto His days and responded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلمی الاعلی ان اذکر من توجه الی الله و سمع ندآئه و فاز بایامه و اجاب
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution
